{{Quote|Any questions? Good. Then Colonel Greymark will begin handing out your individual assignments.|[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]|<ref name="SW67" />}}
[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] '''Greymark''' was a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], and was stationed at [[Haven Base|the Rebel base]] on [[Arbra/Legends|Arbra]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] in the months following the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. He was the officer responsible for handing out the individual assignments for the mission to recover [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] from the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]].<ref name="SW67" />
